name: Sinoe County (Liberia)
description: White field bearing a centred green Greek cross that extends to the edges of the flag; the Liberian national flag forms the canton in the upper hoist.
history: Presented by President William V. S. Tubman on 29 November 1965 together with the flags of the other Liberian counties.

features.symbolism: Sinoe as part of the Republic of Liberia
